GvHD.description: Whether the patient had acute graft-versus-host disease (0=No, 1=Yes); a positive regression coefficient indicates that having GvHD is associated with worse survival.

CML.description: Whether the patient's diagnosis was chronic myeloid leukemia (0=No, 1=Yes); a negative regression coefficient indicates that having CML is associated with better survival (i.e., non-CML patients have worse survival).

Survival.description: Survival outcome predicted by the Cox regression model; the dependent variable whose risk is being modeled.
